## Objective
Describe the deployment or infrastructure goal.

## Current State
Describe the current behavior and constraints.

## Proposed Change
List exact configuration and command changes.

## Verification Plan
- [ ] CI workflow passes
- [ ] VPS pulls correct image
- [ ] Container recreated with latest version
- [ ] Service health check succeeds

## Rollback Plan
Describe how to safely roll back.
